name: Chinchilla
license: Proprietary (Google DeepMind; research model, weights never released)
note: 70B model trained compute-optimally on 1.4T tokens; outperformed 280B Gopher, reshaping LLM scaling laws.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real via arxiv.org/abs/2203.15556 (Training Compute-Optimal Large Language Models) -- confirmed Chinchilla is a 70B model trained on 1.4T tokens using the same compute budget as Gopher, matching paramsB and note. Abstract states MMLU='67.5%' (rounded) but the full paper's detailed comparison table (fetched via ar5iv full text) literally lists 67.6, 65.1 (BIG-bench), 73.2 (TriviaQA), 77.4 (LAMBADA) -- all four rows confirmed as literal table values, kept unchanged. releaseDate 2022-03-29 corresponds to the arxiv submission date and is standard for this paper; closed/proprietary status confirmed (DeepMind research model, no public weights).
